subtitle: Ours begins by listening to yours.

images.alt: Armchair beside a window onto a garden

blocks.text: Some things can only be gained by living them. Roberto Piana grew up immersed in a craft and a city — Milan — that his father, Giancarlo, lived and transformed into a distinct way of doing architecture, starting in 1998.

blocks.alt: Dining room with sculptural chandelier and black marble

blocks.text: Today, Roberto leads the practice with the same approach he brings when entering a home: listening, with perspective and vision, already knowing what to look for. Because within every space is an unseen potential, and within every individual, a singular way of living it.
